code:
%%{IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-02.01 — Contribution Lifecycle (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)

[IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> NORMALIZE : ContributionSubmitted
note right of NORMALIZE
  Canonicalize payload (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)
  Build canonical contribution hash and refs
end note

NORMALIZE --> SYBIL_CHECK : Normalized
note right of SYBIL_CHECK
  Rate limits, graph heuristics, reputation gates
  Uses PoCI (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) & Security signals (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
end note

SYBIL_CHECK --> REJECTED : SybilFlagged
SYBIL_CHECK --> VALIDATE : PassedSybilChecks

VALIDATE --> INTAKE_ALIGN : SchemaValid
VALIDATE --> REJECTED : SchemaInvalid
note right of VALIDATE
  JSON Schema, policy guard, size caps
  Required fields present
end note

INTAKE_ALIGN --> SCORE_IMPACT : AlignmentChecked
note right of INTAKE_ALIGN
  Ethics preflight (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)
  Rubric mapping, human/AI adapters
end note

SCORE_IMPACT --> UPDATE_CP : ImpactScored
note right of SCORE_IMPACT
  Map impact to resonance inputs
  Prepare CP increment
end note

UPDATE_CP --> LEDGER : CPUpdated
note right of UPDATE_CP
  W_i = (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)^alpha with 0 < alpha < 1
  Emit PoC events for Metrics (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
end note

LEDGER --> CONFIRMED : LedgerCommitted
note right of LEDGER
  Append-only event store, snapshot policies
  Reconciliation with external oracles (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
end note

%% ---- Exceptions & reviews ----
SCORE_IMPACT --> REVIEW : AnomalyDetected
REVIEW --> CONFIRMED : ClearedByReview
REVIEW --> REJECTED : RejectedByReview

REJECTED --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]
CONFIRMED --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]

%% =========== Styling ===========
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class NORMALIZE,SYBIL_CHECK,VALIDATE,INTAKE_ALIGN,SCORE_IMPACT,UPDATE_CP,LEDGER,REVIEW,REJECTED,CONFIRMED core;

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic设计一个贡献生命周期状态图，核心是处理从边缘节点提交的数据到最终上链的完整流程。起点是IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode，提交后先进入NORMALIZE状态。
明白，NORMALIZE阶段主要是做数据规范化对吧？我注意到需要处理IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream的payload，还要构建canonical contribution hash。这个阶段的输出是Normalized事件？
对，Normalized之后进入SYBIL_CHECK。这里要用到PoCI机制和IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController的安全信号，做速率限制、图启发式和声誉门控。
SYBIL_CHECK需要两个分支：如果标记为Sybil则进入REJECTED，通过的话进入VALIDATE。另外我需要在SYBIL_CHECK右侧加一个注释框说明这些检查逻辑。
可以。VALIDATE阶段用JSON Schema做策略守卫，检查字段完整性和大小限制。通过后是SchemaValid到INTAKE_ALIGN，不通过就REJECTED。
好，我把VALIDATE的注释加上，说明JSON Schema、策略守卫和大小限制。接下来INTAKE_ALIGN是做什么的？
INTAKE_ALIGN做伦理预检，基于IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream，还有rubric mapping和human/AI适配器。输出AlignmentChecked后到SCORE_IMPACT。
SCORE_IMPACT是把影响映射到resonance inputs，准备CP增量？然后到UPDATE_CP？
没错。UPDATE_CP里有个关键公式：W_i = (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)^alpha，0<alpha<1。同时要向Metrics发送PoC事件，用到IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController。
UPDATE_CP之后是LEDGER，做append-only的事件存储，还有和外部oracle的reconciliation，也是通过IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController？
对，LEDGER提交后是CONFIRMED状态。但还需要一个异常分支：SCORE_IMPACT如果检测到异常，要进入REVIEW状态。
REVIEW之后有两个出口：ClearedByReview到CONFIRMED，RejectedByReview到REJECTED。另外REJECTED和CONFIRMED最终都要回到IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic？
是的，形成闭环。现在给所有核心状态加样式，用橙色填充、粗体白色文字。包括NORMALIZE、SYBIL_CHECK、VALIDATE、INTAKE_ALIGN、SCORE_IMPACT、UPDATE_CP、LEDGER、REVIEW、REJECTED、CONFIRMED。
样式已应用。我检查一下流程：EdgeNode提交→Normalize→Sybil检查→Validate→Intake对齐→评分影响→更新CP→上链确认，异常走Review。整个生命周期覆盖了。
等等，UPDATE_CP的注释里公式写清楚是W_i = (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)^alpha with 0 < alpha < 1，还有Emit PoC events for Metrics。另外LEDGER的注释要提到Append-only event store和external oracles的reconciliation。
已修正UPDATE_CP和LEDGER的注释内容。图标题用SM-02.01 — Contribution Lifecycle (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)，顶部标记IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker。现在状态图完整了。
